metadata.note: Includes 98th ceremony (2026). nominees_2026 section has full nominee lists for Six Degrees connections.
metadata.tmdb_resolution_note: 2026 ceremony films have tmdb_id populated. Historical films have imdb_id (tt*) which can be resolved to TMDB IDs using TMDB's /find/{imdb_id} endpoint. Backend should resolve these at startup or on first use and cache the results.
